paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: BlenderBot 3 introduces a modular architecture that enables dynamic execution of functions such as internet search, knowledge grounding, and long-term memory access through a single transformer model with control codes, allowing for richer, context-aware dialogue
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: R2C2, PersonaChat, EmpatheticDialogues, Multi-SessionChat, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of the Internet, Blended Skill Talk, Natural Questions, SQuAD, TriviaQA, MS MARCO, Funpedia, LIGHT+WILD, SaFeRDialogues
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain conversation, chatbots, instruction following, knowledge-grounded dialogue, task-oriented interactions
raw_extraction.research_problem: Building a responsible, continuously improving conversational agent capable of open-domain dialogue with humans and accessing external information safely
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Modular dialogue fine-tuning (including internet search, knowledge grounding, long-term memory, entity extraction)
